TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu mwani qanim. cingay balay kinqbaqan mluw squ ziray kinhelaw mrkyas. AI qani ga mzyup squ qqnxan ta. kahul squ hngya'an na soci kmraw ita, tehuk squ pinkita nbu. ktan ta nyux s'unan AI kwara. mhtuw squ AI qani ga, balay nya, thuyay maras squ 'llaw na qqnxan, AI ga thuyay mha kbalay krahu na bbrwan, musa r'tung zikang ru cipuq squliq ka pincyawgan nya. kmraw squliq musa kbalay balay ru helaw na zywaw. ana ga, shbun inlungan squ AI qani uzi, myasa anzan na brwan ta nanak, smtama ta iyal AI ru ini ta qbaq mnglung ru mbiyaq mnglung ta nanak, ru cyawawgan ta baq rayri squ AI qani. kwara zywaw qani ga, siki musa ta bleqaw balay musa mita. nanu yasa, AI qani ga sazing squ zywaw qani , mya sa bleqaw ta cukaw ga, AI qani ga musa remuruw squ syakay ta. ana ga, ini ta leqi mita kinyaqih nya lga, musa maras squ giqas na kinqhut na zywaw. babaw nya, spiyang balay ga squliq ru AI msqun squ mcizywaw, yasa baq lmeliq ru lemrruw syakay ta.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu mwani qanim. ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj kinqβaqan mluw s~ɕqu ziraj kinħelaw mrkjas~ɕ. ai qani ɣa mzjup s~ɕqu qqnxan ta. kaħul s~ɕqu ħŋjaʔan na s~ɕoʦ~ʨi kmraw ita, teħuk s~ɕqu pinkita nβu. ktan ta njux s~ɕʔunan ai kwara. mħtuw s~ɕqu ai qani ɣa, βalaj nja, tħujaj maras~ɕ s~ɕqu ʔllaw na qqnxan, ai ɣa tħujaj mħa kβalaj kraħu na ββrwan, mus~ɕa rʔtuŋ zikaŋ ru ʦ~ʨipuq s~ɕquliq ka pinʦ~ʨjawɣan nja. kmraw s~ɕquliq mus~ɕa kβalaj βalaj ru ħelaw na zjwaw. ana ɣa, s~ɕħβun inluŋan s~ɕqu ai qani uzi, mjas~ɕa anzan na βrwan ta nanak, s~ɕmtama ta ijal ai ru ini ta qβaq mŋluŋ ru mβijaq mŋluŋ ta nanak, ru ʦ~ʨjawawɣan ta βaq rajri s~ɕqu ai qani. kwara zjwaw qani ɣa, s~ɕiki mus~ɕa ta βleqaw βalaj mus~ɕa mita. nanu jas~ɕa, ai qani ɣa s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕqu zjwaw qani , mja s~ɕa βleqaw ta ʦ~ʨukaw ɣa, ai qani ɣa mus~ɕa remuruw s~ɕqu s~ɕjakaj ta. ana ɣa, ini ta leqi mita kinjaqiħ nja lɣa, mus~ɕa maras~ɕ s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ na kinqħut na zjwaw. βaβaw nja, s~ɕpijaŋ βalaj ɣa s~ɕquliq ru ai ms~ɕqun s~ɕqu mʦ~ʨizjwaw, jas~ɕa βaq lmeliq ru lemrruw s~ɕjakaj ta.
S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu mwani qanim. cingay balay kinqbaqan mluw squ ziray kinhelaw mrkyas. AI qani ga mzyup squ qqnxan ta. kahul squ hngya'an na soci kmraw ita, tehuk squ pinkita nbu. ktan ta nyux s'unan AI kwara. mhtuw squ AI qani ga, balay nya, thuyay maras squ 'llaw na qqnxan, AI ga thuyay mha kbalay krahu na bbrwan, musa r'tung zikang ru cipuq squliq ka pincyawgan nya. kmraw squliq musa kbalay balay ru helaw na zywaw. ana ga, shbun inlungan squ AI qani uzi, myasa anzan na brwan ta nanak, smtama ta iyal AI ru ini ta qbaq mnglung ru mbiyaq mnglung ta nanak, ru cyawawgan ta baq rayri squ AI qani. kwara zywaw qani ga, siki musa ta bleqaw balay musa mita. nanu yasa, AI qani ga sazing squ zywaw qani , mya sa bleqaw ta cukaw ga, AI qani ga musa remuruw squ syakay ta. ana ga, ini ta leqi mita kinyaqih nya lga, musa maras squ giqas na kinqhut na zywaw. babaw nya, spiyang balay ga squliq ru AI msqun squ mcizywaw, yasa baq lmeliq ru lemrruw syakay ta.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu mwani qanim. ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj kinqβaqan mluw s~ɕqu ziraj kinħelaw mrkjas~ɕ. ai qani ɣa mzjup s~ɕqu qqnxan ta. kaħul s~ɕqu ħŋjaʔan na s~ɕoʦ~ʨi kmraw ita, teħuk s~ɕqu pinkita nβu. ktan ta njux s~ɕʔunan ai kwara. mħtuw s~ɕqu ai qani ɣa, βalaj nja, tħujaj maras~ɕ s~ɕqu ʔllaw na qqnxan, ai ɣa tħujaj mħa kβalaj kraħu na ββrwan, mus~ɕa rʔtuŋ zikaŋ ru ʦ~ʨipuq s~ɕquliq ka pinʦ~ʨjawɣan nja. kmraw s~ɕquliq mus~ɕa kβalaj βalaj ru ħelaw na zjwaw. ana ɣa, s~ɕħβun inluŋan s~ɕqu ai qani uzi, mjas~ɕa anzan na βrwan ta nanak, s~ɕmtama ta ijal ai ru ini ta qβaq mŋluŋ ru mβijaq mŋluŋ ta nanak, ru ʦ~ʨjawawɣan ta βaq rajri s~ɕqu ai qani. kwara zjwaw qani ɣa, s~ɕiki mus~ɕa ta βleqaw βalaj mus~ɕa mita. nanu jas~ɕa, ai qani ɣa s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕqu zjwaw qani , mja s~ɕa βleqaw ta ʦ~ʨukaw ɣa, ai qani ɣa mus~ɕa remuruw s~ɕqu s~ɕjakaj ta. ana ɣa, ini ta leqi mita kinjaqiħ nja lɣa, mus~ɕa maras~ɕ s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ na kinqħut na zjwaw. βaβaw nja, s~ɕpijaŋ βalaj ɣa s~ɕquliq ru ai ms~ɕqun s~ɕqu mʦ~ʨizjwaw, jas~ɕa βaq lmeliq ru lemrruw s~ɕjakaj ta.
